items.description: Make any website your CLI. A powerful, AI-native runtime for seamless browser automation and dynamic web data extraction.

items.description: Multi-service toolkit for Tavily and Firecrawl signup automation, key validation, and isolated proxy pools.

items.name: autoresearch
items.description: Claude Autoresearch Skill — Autonomous goal-directed iteration for Claude Code. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch. Modify → Verify → Keep/Discard → Repeat forever.

items.name: OpenSquirrel
items.description: For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it.

items.name: Understand-Anything
items.description: Claude Code skills that turn any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about.

items.name: jobs
items.description: A research tool for visually exploring Bureau of Labor Statistics Occupational Outlook Handbook data. This is not a report, a paper, or a serious economic publication — it is a development tool for exploring BLS data visually.

items.name: pi-generative-ui
items.description: Claude.ai's generative UI — reverse-engineered, rebuilt for pi. Interactive HTML/SVG widgets in native macOS windows.
